title: <div><tt>The scarecrow symbolizes the fears and challenges that appear to be sca
content:
The scarecrow symbolizes the fears and challenges that appear to be scary but can be overcome with determination. Phoenix’s ability to move past these symbolic obstacles demonstrates her perseverance to sacrifice for her grandson. These symbols
show that her journey is not just a physical journey but also a sign to her determined strength and love.
Reference:
Welty, E. (1941). A worn path. In The collected stories of Eudora Welty (pp. 222-227). Random House

from Week 5 Discussion
Feb 7, 2025 9:06AM
Michelle Loyfman
Hi Michelle! I completely agree with your view on The Worn Path and how symbolism shows that Phoenix Jacksons strength and sacrifice. Her name is a powerful symbol, connecting her to the mythical Phoenix, a bird that rises from its own ashes. Although she reached her old age and physical struggles, she continues her journey because of her deep love for her grandson. This shows how love and devotion can give someone incredible strength, even when they are weak or tired and want to give up.
